creator: felixp@gmail.com
text:
When trying to install the latest version of Mysql, the install command
does not go through... and it outputs:


-- Up-to-date: /usr/local/man/man1/mysqld_safe.1
-- Up-to-date: /usr/local/man/man1/mysqldumpslow.1
-- Up-to-date: /usr/local/man/man1/mysqlhotcopy.1
-- Up-to-date: /usr/local/man/man1/mysqlman.1
-- Up-to-date: /usr/local/man/man1/mysqltest.1
-- Up-to-date: /usr/local/man/man1/perror.1
-- Up-to-date: /usr/local/man/man1/replace.1
-- Up-to-date: /usr/local/man/man1/resolve_stack_dump.1
-- Up-to-date: /usr/local/man/man1/resolveip.1
-- Up-to-date: /usr/local/man/man8/mysqld.8
===> Installing rc.d startup script(s)
install: invalid file mode: /usr/ports/databases/mysql55-server/work/mysql-server.sh
*** Error code 64

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/mysql55-server.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/mysql55-server.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/databases/mysql55-server && make install
